subject: Project Management
title: Bottleneck Theory
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Bottleneck Theory.

hook.text: Every system has one constraint — one step that limits the flow of everything.

buildup.text: If testing can only process five items a week, it doesn't matter if dev produces twenty.

discovery.text: On a Kanban board, the bottleneck is the column where cards pile up waiting.

twist.text: Improving anything other than the bottleneck is wasted effort. The constraint controls the system.

climax.text: Find the bottleneck. Fix the bottleneck. Then find the next one. Repeat forever.

punchline.text: A system is only as fast as its slowest step.

quiz.question: Why is it important to identify the bottleneck?
options: Improving anything else is wasted effort
